    async queryPermission(name) {
        if ('permissions' in navigator) {
            return navigator['permissions'].query({ name: name });
        }

    }
    getClipboardAPI() {
        if ('clipboard' in navigator) {
            return navigator['clipboard'];
        }
        throw new Error('Async Clipboard API unavailable');
